employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.general_idea: Comment out the custom serializer configuration in the client bean, likely due to changes in serialization requirements or debugging.
Reformat the server-side SerializerConfig instantiation to use multi-line syntax for better readability.
Reorder import statements to group third-party libraries before Spring framework imports.
Replace Stream.collect(Collectors.toList()) with ArrayList constructor for simpler list conversion.

employee-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin.general_idea: Decrease the number of iterations in the test loop to improve test execution speed and resource usage.
employee-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin.human_impl: Changed the loop limit from 2000000 to 1000.

employee-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin.general_idea: Adjust test method visibility to package-private, which is the default expectation for JUnit 5 tests.
employee-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin.human_impl: Removed the 'public' modifier from the 'add' test method.

person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Replace hardcoded Hazelcast connection address with a configurable property to support dynamic environments.
Comment out the group name and password configuration, effectively disabling explicit security settings in the client config.

person-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Introduce a Hazelcast Testcontainer to provide an isolated data grid instance for testing.
person-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin/s.human_impl: @Container private static final GenericContainer HAZELCAST = new GenericContainer(...)

person-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Use DynamicPropertySource to inject runtime container connection details into the Spring context.
Decrease the number of records inserted in the test to improve execution speed and resource usage.
Add a new test method to verify the repository's find functionality.

Added a SonarQube module key property for code quality analysis integration.
Updated the spring-data-hazelcast dependency version to 2.4.0.
Removed the explicit hazelcast-client dependency, likely managed by the new parent or other transitive deps.
Added the hazelcast-kubernetes dependency to enable Kubernetes discovery for Hazelcast.
Added the spring-boot-maven-plugin to the build section for repackaging.
Added the jib-maven-plugin to enable container image building directly from Maven.
